name: Dr. Arjun Mehta
bio: PhD in Computer Science from IIT Delhi. 12+ years of teaching experience. Passionate about making algorithms accessible to everyone. Published researcher in machine learning and computational complexity.

name: Ms. Priya Sharma
bio: Senior Front-End Engineer with 8 years at top product companies. Expert in modern JavaScript, React, and CSS architecture. Loves building beautiful, accessible UIs and teaching others to do the same.

name: Mr. Karan Nair
bio: 10 years of systems programming experience across embedded systems and game engines. Competitive programming finalist. Believes C++ is an art form and aims to teach it with that perspective.
